scripts.build:fullstack: pnpm --filter @layo/renderer build && pnpm --filter @layo/collaboration build && pnpm --filter @layo/web typecheck && pnpm --dir apps/web exec vite build --base=/app/ && pnpm --filter @layo/server build
scripts.test: node --test scripts/check-design-rules.test.mjs && node --test scripts/check-deployment-artifacts.test.mjs && node --test scripts/check-agent-learning-loop.test.mjs && node --test scripts/check-post-merge-cleanup.test.mjs && node --test scripts/check-layo-branding.test.mjs && node --test scripts/check-dev-scripts.test.mjs && pnpm run check:penpot-maturity && pnpm run check:design-rules && pnpm -r test && cargo test --workspace
